basics.name: Han
basics.label: Programmer
basics.summary:
Hello, I'm Robert Smith. I am an aspiring software developer with a love for all things compuers!
I have lots of experience with many different languages ranging from vb.net, to HTML, CSS, JS all the way to assembly and c.
Aside from software development, I'm also a quick learner with strong analytical skills and a detail-oriented approach to problem-solving.
I thrive in fast-paced, challenging environments where I can use my creativity and technical expertise to develop effective solutions.
If you're looking for a dedicated and talented software developer who can bring your vision to life, then look no further!
I'm eager to take on new challenges and create amazing software solutions for you and your business.

education.area: Motor Vehicle Service, Diagnostics and Repair Level 3

references.name: Simon Hopcroft, Carpetright
references.reference: It is my pleasure to recommend Robert, his performance working as a Deputy/Manager Cnder carpetright proved that he will be a valuable addition to any company. He has been able to handle anything thrown at him.
